title: Implement tx boundary events and semantic memory updates
summary: Emit transaction boundary events and persist semantic_summary/user_intent updates for deterministic resume intent handling.
outputs: Updated tx boundary event emission in ops tools
Semantic memory update flow for semantic_summary and user_intent
acceptance_criteria: tx.begin, tx.step.enter, tx.verify.*, tx.commit.*, tx.end.* events are emitted in correct order.
semantic_summary and user_intent updates are emitted deterministically from canonical inputs.
File intent registration is enforced before mutation events.
Failure paths emit tx.*.fail events with concise error context.

steps.description: Implement tx boundary event emission in ops tool flows.
Add semantic memory update emission for summary and user intent.
Enforce intent-before-mutation and emit tx.*.fail on errors.

notes: Coordinate event payload fields with the new schema from p3-t1.
Semantic memory must be derived deterministically from persisted inputs.
